recap:
- To create a monitor for the processed inference table, navigate to the Catalog and enable monitoring from the Quality tab.
- Configuration for the monitor can be set up through the UI, focusing on a Timeseries profile.
- Using the databricks-sdk, a monitor can be created by specifying the table name, timestamp column, and other parameters in Python.
- Monitor creation typically takes 10-15 minutes; check the status to ensure it is active before proceeding.
- Manual refresh of metrics can be performed to update the metrics and dashboards as needed.
- Review the created monitor and associated data in the Catalog Explorer for insights and performance tracking.
